title: Puchi Eva DS
wikitext:
[]: Puchi Eva DS             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:00 am After looking at the Japanese blog at evangelion.jp, I discovered they are going to be making a Eva@School game. So far, it looks like a cutesy AU that Evangelion is sorta known for. It looks like it is the daily life of the chibis and stuff. Disappointed Shinji is a laugh, although looks odd. SAUCE: http://translate.google.com/translate?u=http%3A%2F%2Feva.b-ch.com%2Fblog%2Fnerv&langpair=ja%7Cen&hl=en&ie=UTF-8 Follow the links in the first post for more information.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:36 am Lol. I remembered that video you put up about that. That was hilarious with what Shinji eating batteries and having to go to the toilet.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:44 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Lol. I remembered that video you put up about that. That was hilarious with what Shinji eating batteries and having to go to the toilet.
